description: auto plugin hooks. SessionStart surfaces resumable runs (orphaned pulse chains + handoff pauses) so the operator can /auto-resume them — surfacing only, never auto-runs. Stop is the engine's OWN deliberate-stop guard: per the U9 spike (docs/research/native-goal-mechanism-spike.md) native /goal is a closed model-judged loop with no external predicate handoff, so auto ships its own thin Stop hook that BLOCKS via {"decision":"block"} (exit 0) while the I-1-fresh run-record predicate is unmet. PreToolUse adds the v0.6.0 advisor gate (KTD-4/5): on AskUserQuestion, on-pretooluse-askuser.sh DENIES + redirects to the advisor when a LIVE self-driven run owns this session (session_id == run_record.driving_session_id) — fail-OPEN; on Bash|Write, on-pretooluse-action.sh deterministically escalates the CLAUDE.md-anchored destructive set via the pause handoff — fail-CLOSED (pauses the run even if deny is unavailable). All hooks presence-gate (walk up for <repo>/.claude/auto) and always exit 0 (rel-001). Hook arrays merge additively, so this composes with cmux's entries and any native /goal.
